case_title: LEE, CARRIE E. EXECUTOR FOR EMILY M.LEE ESTATE VS GREEN STREET MORTUARY et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY LEE, CARRIE E. EXECUTOR FOR EMILY M.LEE ESTATE AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN STREET MORTUARY YEE, CLIFFORD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-10-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO CLIFFORD YEE RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, CARRIE E. EXECUTOR FOR EMILY M.LEE ESTATE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YEE, CLIFFORD $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,520.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
